pkgmetadata.longdescription: bookdoctor is a quality-gate CLI for Calibre ebook libraries. It fingerprints, validates, and repairs metadata for large libraries using a multi-signal confidence-scoring pipeline (sources include Open Library, Google Books, Wikidata, VIAF, and the Open Library editions dump). The two-pass workflow score -> apply -> promote ensures the live library is never touched without an explicit user action. The per-add flow (bookdoctor check) integrates with Calibre via a FileTypePlugin to gate every new book at intake.
